audit.title: Generate Audit Report

audit.salesDesc: Revenue, daily breakdown, day-of-week performance, monthly trends, cash vs card analysis
audit.expensesDesc: Cost breakdown, supplier invoices, fixed expenses, pending payments, monthly cost trends
audit.staffDesc: Attendance tracking, days worked, revenue per shift, performance ranking, absence log
audit.fullAuditDesc: Complete business report — all sections above plus executive summary and key insights
audit.selectOne: Select at least one section to continue

aiScan.invoiceDisclaimer: Blurry photos, poor lighting or handwritten invoices can cause reading errors. Please double-check the supplier details, amounts and tax values below before saving.
aiScan.salesDisclaimer: Please verify the cash, card and total amounts below match your actual receipt before saving.
aiScan.batchDisclaimer: AI extraction isn't perfect, especially across multiple photos. Review each item below before clicking Save All — tap any scanned item to check its details.
aiScan.tipBody: Take photos in good lighting, keep the receipt flat, and make sure all text is in focus. You can always edit any detail after scanning.

venueLock.bannerSub: All your data is safe and viewable. Upgrade to resume editing these venues.
venueLock.modalDescription: Your current plan only includes {{count}} venue(s). This venue has historical data you can still view, but adding new entries requires upgrading your plan.

common.selectVenue: Select a venue to add data
common.viewingAll: Viewing all venues. Select a specific venue to add new data.
common.noVenueGate: Welcome! Before you start, add your first venue.

landing.hero1: Save time. Let AI do the
landing.heroSub: Track sales, invoices, product prices, suppliers & more — with AI, from your phone. Audit your analytics with AI to scale and improve your business.
landing.trustLine: Free 7-day trial · No card required · GDPR compliant · Made for European small businesses
landing.contactSub: Have a question or need help? Send us a message.
landing.messageSent: Message sent! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
landing.contactError: Could not send message. Please try again or email us directly at support@apexmanager.app
landing.featuresTitle: AI Invoice Scanning, Sales Tracking & Business Analytics for Small Business
landing.featuresSub: Scan supplier invoices with AI, log daily cash and card sales, track costs and export audit reports — built for restaurants, cafés and European SMBs.
landing.feature1Title: Scan Invoices & Track Supplier Prices with AI
landing.feature1Desc: Photograph any supplier invoice. AI extracts every item, price, tax, NIF and IBAN automatically — and updates your product price database every time.
landing.feature2Title: Track Daily Sales From Your Phone
landing.feature2Desc: Log cash and card sales in seconds. Scan your POS daily report with AI. Track staff attendance without a spreadsheet.
landing.feature3Title: Audit Your Business Analytics with AI
landing.feature3Desc: Revenue trends, cost breakdowns, profit margins and supplier spend — filtered by venue or date range. Know your numbers without an accountant.
landing.feature4Title: Generate Audit Reports in One Click
landing.feature4Desc: Professional, print-ready business reports. Sales, expenses, staff attendance or a full audit — export exactly what you need, when you need it.
landing.feature5Desc: One account for every location. Switch venues instantly. Data always separated, overview always unified.
landing.pricingSub: 14-day free trial on all paid plans. No credit card required to start.
landing.faq1Q: Do I need a credit card to start?
landing.faq1A: No. Every new account gets a 7-day free trial with full Growth-tier features automatically — no card required. After the trial you can choose a plan or continue on the Free tier.
landing.faq2A: Yes. All data is encrypted and stored in European servers. We are fully GDPR compliant.
landing.faq3Q: Can I use it for multiple locations?
landing.faq3A: Yes, the Growth plan supports up to 3 venues and Pro supports unlimited.
landing.faq4A: Yes. Subscribers can export Sales, Expenses, Staff and full Audit reports as print-ready documents. Free accounts have access to weekly data.
landing.faq5A: Yes, cancel from your account settings at any time. No lock-in contracts.
landing.faq6A: Currently English and Portuguese. More languages are on the roadmap.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to take control of your costs?
landing.ctaSub: Join hundreds of business owners who stopped guessing and started knowing.
landing.testimonialSub: Join hundreds of operators across Portugal who use Apex Manager every day.
landing.testimonial1Quote: Finally I know my actual costs without spending hours in Excel. The invoice scanning alone is worth every cent.
landing.testimonial2Quote: I manage 3 restaurants and this is the first tool that actually makes multi-venue management feel simple.
landing.testimonial3Quote: Scanning invoices with my phone and having everything organised automatically changed how I run my kitchen.
